About

This is an interactive family tree built from genealogical records collected over many years.

You can explore the tree by panning and zooming the canvas. Click on any person to see their details. Use the search to quickly jump to someone by name.

If you notice missing or incorrect information, you can edit it directly and send your changes to the administrator for review using the data panel.

All data is encrypted and stored only in this file. Nothing is sent to any server unless you explicitly use the "Send to admin" feature.

Settings

Dark mode

Local edits

You made local changes which are currently stored only on this device. You can send them to the administrator for review and inclusion in the tree.

No local edits

You can leave a feedback and a contact email to hear back from the administrator.

Advanced

Export data

Downloads all current tree data including your local edits as a data.js file.

Import GEDCOM

Converts a .ged file exported from a genealogy app into the format used by this website. This does not load data into the tree — it downloads a data.js file that a developer then integrates manually. Intended for developers only.

Make a copy of this site

Creates a self-contained index.html with all family data encrypted inside it using the password you choose. Anyone with the password can open it in a browser — no server or internet connection needed.

    Add relative

    Reset all local edits? All your changes will be permanently lost on this device and cannot be recovered.
